project: TN-Check: Certified CSL Model Checking via Tensor-Train Decomposition

claims.claim: Error contraction theorem: truncation errors accumulate linearly (not exponentially) due to Metzler contractivity
code_evidence: tn_check/error/propagation.py: semigroup_error_bound() — implements linear accumulation bound

claims.claim: Clamping error bound: ||p_clamped - p_exact||_1 <= 2*eps_trunc (Proposition 1, strengthened with tight bound estimation)
Bond-dimension preservation: axis-aligned atomic propositions produce rank-1 TT masks, preserving MPO bond dimension under projection
code_evidence: tn_check/checker/satisfaction.py: project_rate_matrix() — mask application via apply_diagonal_mask_to_mpo()
tn_check/tensor/algebra.py: apply_diagonal_mask_to_mpo() — Kronecker product preserving structure

claims.claim: Complexity separation for modular CTMCs: TT-based checking is polynomial in N for bounded-coupling networks
code_evidence: tn_check/models/library.py: cascade() — modular cascade benchmark with bounded coupling

claims.claim: Independent certificate verification with 11 soundness checks
code_evidence: tn_check/verifier/checker.py: CertificateVerifier — 11 checks including clamping proof consistency and error monotonicity
tn_check/verifier/trace.py: VerificationTrace — JSON-serializable trace with ClampingProofRecord

claims.claim: Spectral-gap-informed convergence prediction with Rayleigh quotient refinement and adaptive bounded-until fallback
code_evidence: tn_check/checker/spectral.py: estimate_spectral_gap() — power iteration + Rayleigh refinement

claims.claim: Distributional diagnostics: marginals, moments, KL divergence, negative mass tracking
code_evidence: tn_check/diagnostics.py: marginal_distribution(), compute_moments(), kl_divergence_marginal(), total_negative_mass(), validate_probability_vector()

claims.claim: Full CSL model checking on MPS-compressed probability vectors with three-valued semantics
Birth-death MPS exactly represents single-site Poisson distribution
Non-negativity-preserving rounding reduces negativity compared to naive truncation
Exponential compression: N=10 species yields 2×10^19:1 compression ratio, N=15 yields 1.82×10^28:1
Toggle switch TT matches dense reference to L1 = 1.5×10^{-11}
5 realistic biological models: gene expression, exclusive switch, SIR epidemic, Michaelis-Menten enzyme, multi-species cascade
code_evidence: tn_check/models/library.py: gene_expression(), exclusive_switch(), sir_epidemic(), michaelis_menten_enzyme(), multi_species_cascade()
test_evidence: tests/test_benchmarks.py: 23 tests covering all new models and benchmarks

critiques_addressed.critique: Unresolved clamping gap in SVD truncation (Yuan Cheng, Joseph S. Chang)
critiques_addressed.resolution: Proposition 1 with full proof, tight_clamping_bound() for practical tighter estimates, ClampingProof for per-iteration tracking, verify_clamping_proposition() for numerical verification. 54 tests covering the bound.

critiques_addressed.critique: No independent certificate verification (Joseph S. Chang, Lila Zhang)
critiques_addressed.resolution: CertificateVerifier with 11 soundness checks including clamping proof consistency and error monotonicity. JSON-serializable traces for external auditing. 12 tests.

critiques_addressed.critique: Fragile fixpoint iteration for slowly-mixing CTMCs (Aniruddha Sinha)
critiques_addressed.resolution: Spectral-gap-informed convergence prediction with Rayleigh quotient refinement, ConvergencePredictor class, adaptive bounded-until fallback. 9 tests.
Full pen-and-paper proofs in appendix with numerical verification via verify_clamping_proposition(). Machine-checked Lean proofs listed as future work.

critiques_addressed.critique: Non-axis-aligned predicates have exponential TT rank (Lila Zhang)
critiques_addressed.resolution: LinearPredicate support with carry-based TT construction (bounded rank). Documented rank growth analysis in paper. Practical for small numbers of active species.
